mobile.title: Self-Service Application for Mobile Operator
mobile.description: Delivered a flexible mobile self-service app with seamless UX, real-time features, and secure telecom integration.
mobile.clientDescription: A leading prepaid cellular service provider. Known for their flexibility and lifestyle-focused branding, the company delivers affordable and customizable mobile connectivity to a wide customer base.
mobile.challenge: In the competitive prepaid telecom market, user expectations for digital services are high, especially when it comes to speed, convenience, and personalization. The client needed a robust and flexible mobile self-service app that could support a variety of functions, from real-time balance checks and data package purchases to delivering targeted promotional offers. One of the core challenges was maintaining a seamless and visually dynamic user experience, especially during frequent promotional campaigns that required quick front-end updates and custom UI elements. At the same time, the app had to ensure smooth back-end integration with telecom systems, secure transactions, and consistent performance across devices and user bases. Balancing technical complexity with fast iteration and marketing agility was key.
mobile.solution: To meet the client's needs, we assembled a dedicated team focused on end-to-end mobile app development covering both front-end customization and back-end system integration. Our developers worked closely with the client's product and marketing teams to ensure that the app not only delivered core telecom functionality like balance tracking, data package ordering, and SIM management, but could also be quickly adapted to reflect seasonal campaigns and lifestyle-driven promotions. On the back end, the team ensured reliable and secure connections to the client's telecom infrastructure, supporting smooth user authentication, payment processing, and service activation workflows. On the front end, we implemented a modular UI framework that allowed for fast rollout of custom visuals and dynamic content enabling real-time updates without compromising performance.
mobile.outcome1: Seamless user experience across Android and iOS
mobile.outcome2: Ensured stable and secure integration with core telecom systems

medical.title: Medical Staff e-Learning Suite
medical.description: A fully integrated e-learning platform enabling modern medical training with hybrid labs and video-based assessment.
medical.clientDescription: A forward-thinking medical training centre that strives to digitalise and streamline medical training with next-generation solutions.
medical.challengeP1: The medical training center needed more than a standard e-learning system—it required a solution that could handle the complex logistics of daily academic operations while also supporting next-gen, instructor-free training models. Manual workflows made student enrollment, attendance tracking, and training room allocation time-consuming and error-prone.
medical.challengeP2: Additionally, traditional methods of training and assessment relied heavily on in-person supervision, limiting flexibility for both students and staff. The center envisioned a new kind of training experience where hybrid labs could enable students to perform hands-on tasks independently, with their performance captured and reviewed later via video-based evaluation. The challenge was to build an integrated platform that could meet these operational needs while embracing remote assessment, automation, and scalable learning formats tailored for medical education.
medical.solutionP1: To meet the center's evolving needs, we developed a fully integrated e-learning suite tailored specifically for medical training environments. The platform covers the complete learner journey—from online student enrollment and secure identity verification to attendance tracking, space allocation, and digital exam administration. Built with flexibility in mind, the system supports both in-person and remote learning formats.
medical.solutionP2: At the heart of the solution is its support for hybrid lab training—a forward-looking model that allows students to perform hands-on exercises independently, without the need for an instructor to be physically present. All student actions in the lab are video recorded and stored securely, enabling instructors to review performance at a later time and provide detailed feedback.
medical.solutionP3: Notifications and updates are delivered in real time to keep students and staff informed, while the admin panel provides training managers with complete oversight of space scheduling, session planning, and exam tracking. The platform simplifies training operations, supports remote skill assessments, and enables the adoption of innovative learning models in medical education.
medical.outcome2: Streamlined enrollment, attendance, exams, and scheduling in one unified platform
medical.outcome3: Enabled hybrid lab training model with video-based assessment
medical.outcome4: Improved training accessibility and flexibility for students
medical.outcome6: Simplified tracking of exam results and lab availability

website.title: User Module for Global High-Traffic Website
website.description: Enhanced user module for a high-traffic sports portal handling 10M+ monthly visitors with optimized performance and scalability.
website.clientDescription: Operates a global sports web portal, which receives more than 10M visitors per month and millions of registered users worldwide.
website.challenge: With over 10 million monthly visitors and millions of active accounts, the client's platform faced the complex challenge of scaling a high-traffic web portal without compromising speed or user experience. Ensuring smooth performance across diverse regions and devices required a robust, future-proof architecture. Additionally, maintaining secure user account management, integrating personalized content delivery, and supporting features like subscriptions and e-commerce demanded seamless backend development and real-time responsiveness—all while minimizing downtime and maintaining platform stability at scale.
website.solution: To address these challenges, we were tasked with assembling a dedicated development team focused on enhancing the platform's user module—the core component driving user authentication, profile management, subscription preferences, and more. Leveraging our experience in high-traffic website development, we optimized data flows and implemented scalable microservice architecture to ensure smooth performance under peak loads. Our developers collaborated closely with the client's in-house team to introduce modular improvements, support real-time content delivery, and boost system responsiveness. Continuous testing and performance monitoring were embedded to maintain system integrity and ensure an uninterrupted user experience for millions of global fans.
website.outcome1: Optimised platform to handle over 10M monthly visits without latency
website.outcome2: Enhanced login, profile, and preference flows for millions of registered users
website.outcome3: Future-proof foundation ready to support ongoing feature growth and traffic spikes
website.outcome4: Agile collaboration enabled quicker updates and responsiveness to business needs

flowsms.title: Unlimited SMS via Real Android Phones
flowsms.description: An Android-based SMS sending platform that turns real phones into scalable messaging gateways — no per-message fees, no third-party APIs.
flowsms.heroTitle: FlowSMS — Send unlimited SMS using real Android phones
flowsms.heroDesc: An Android-based SMS sending platform that turns real phones into scalable messaging gateways — no per-message fees, no third-party APIs.
flowsms.overviewTitle: Turn Android phones into SMS gateways
flowsms.overviewDesc: FlowSMS lets businesses connect Android phones with SIM or eSIM cards to a web dashboard and send SMS at scale. No gateways, no per-message fees — just add devices to increase capacity. Setup takes less than 3 minutes.
flowsms.challengeDesc: Traditional SMS APIs like Twilio charge per message, making high-volume campaigns expensive. Businesses have no control over delivery infrastructure, face rate limits, and can't scale without increasing costs linearly.
flowsms.solutionDesc: FlowSMS uses real Android devices as SMS gateways. Install the app, connect to the dashboard, and start sending. Messages are auto-distributed across devices. Scale by simply adding more phones — costs stay flat.
flowsms.featuresTitle: Everything you need for SMS at scale
flowsms.feature1Desc: Connect real Android phones with SIM or eSIM — no third-party gateways or per-SMS fees.
flowsms.feature2Desc: Upload CSV or use the API to send thousands of messages distributed across devices.
flowsms.feature3Desc: Import, tag, segment, and organize contacts with smart filters and lists.
flowsms.feature4Desc: Track delivery rates, sent/failed/received metrics, and device performance.
flowsms.feature5Desc: Receive and view incoming SMS replies in a unified inbox.
flowsms.feature6Desc: Messages are automatically balanced across connected devices for optimal throughput.
flowsms.screenshot1Desc: Track total campaigns, active and scheduled status, device capacity, and estimated sending speed.
flowsms.screenshot2Desc: Manage your contact database with import, search, and CSV upload — organized by name, phone, email, and country.
flowsms.screenshot3Desc: Set up keyword-based rules to auto-reply, opt-out contacts, or tag inbound messages automatically.
flowsms.screenshot4Desc: Scan a QR code from the FlowSMS Android app to instantly connect your phone as an SMS gateway device.
flowsms.ctaDesc: We design and build custom SaaS platforms, automation tools, and enterprise software.

offer.faq1Q: How fast is the website ready?
offer.faq1A: Most projects are completed within 5–10 business days, depending on complexity and content delivery speed.
offer.faq2Q: Do I need to buy hosting?
offer.faq2A: No — hosting is included in every package. You don't need to worry about anything technical.
offer.faq3Q: Can I upgrade my website later?
offer.faq3A: Of course! You can upgrade to a larger package or add new features at any time.
offer.faq4A: Yes, we can set up a CMS system that allows you to easily edit text and images.
offer.faq5Q: Will my website bring me clients?
offer.faq5A: A website is the foundation, but for continuous inquiries you need to combine it with advertising and good content.
offer.faq6A: Yes. Besides building websites, we also set up ads and systems to bring you clients.

caseHighlights.title: Selected case studies
caseHighlights.subtitle: Real projects, real problems and real results — no generic screenshots.

trazilica.problem: Data on 340,000+ Croatian companies was scattered across official registers — searching was slow and fragmented.
trazilica.solution: We built a unified search engine with an ElasticSearch index, a clean React interface and advanced filters across all registers.
trazilica.result: Users find in seconds the data they used to look up across multiple different sources.

flowsms.problem: SMS APIs like Twilio charge per message, making high-volume campaigns expensive and unpredictable.
flowsms.solution: We built a platform that uses real Android devices as gateways — with no per-message fees and automatic traffic distribution.
flowsms.result: 98.2% delivery rate, campaigns run 3× faster, and cost per message drops to zero.

careflow.problem: NGOs used Excel, paper and disconnected tools for members, donors and communication — wasting time and prone to errors.
careflow.solution: We built a digital platform that centralizes membership, donations, communication and activities in one interface.
careflow.result: Administrative workload reduced; data on members and donors is in one place and available instantly.

seoAuditPage.title: Free SEO audit of your website
seoAuditPage.subtitle: Check the basic SEO, speed and technical issues on your website in just a few seconds.
seoAuditPage.analysisNote: The analysis is informational and does not store data about your website.
seoAuditPage.checksSubtitle: A quick, automated check of the key SEO and technical parameters that most affect visibility and conversion.

checks.c2: Structure of H1, H2 and H3 elements
checks.c4: Mobile performance and Core Web Vitals

samples.s1Rec: Add a unique meta description (up to 160 characters) for each page.
samples.s2Rec: Convert images to WebP/AVIF format and use a responsive srcset.
samples.s3Rec: Keep only one H1 per page and structure content with H2/H3.
samples.s4Title: Slow Largest Contentful Paint on mobile devices
samples.s4Rec: Reduce render-blocking JS/CSS and lazy-load images outside the viewport.
samples.s5Rec: Generate sitemap.xml and reference it in robots.txt.
